title: Looking for Category Manager at Zostel

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Zostel
jsonLd.description:
Join the Zostel family as a Category Manager in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Zostel:
Zostel is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zostel!
